text: Due to lower costs, students can access more courses.
label: cause_explanation

text: For instance, rural learners can join advanced classes online.
label: example_elaboration

text: Despite its advantages, online learning may not fit every subject.
label: contrast_concession

text: Historically, education has depended on physical classrooms.
label: background_circumstance

text: To sum up, schools should combine online and classroom learning.
label: summary_conclusion

text: This means that access is a central measure of educational fairness.
label: evaluation_interpretation
